calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-12-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:

Tony Ruch, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Phillip R. Morgan, Esq. appeared with defendants Maybelline Libang and William Bayudan through limited scope representation.
The Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502A for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed Settlement Ageeement and Stipulation for entry of Judgment or Dismissal which was filed with the Clerk in Department 514.

This case settled, the trial date of May 16, 2011 is VACATED.
